history.text: Write a highly detailed, descriptive prompt of this image in English for an AI text-to-image generator (such as Midjourney, DALL-E, or Stable Diffusion). Describe the objects, background, style, lighting, color palette, and mood in detail. Do NOT include any introductory or concluding conversational text. Do not say 'Here is the prompt' or similar. Output ONLY the raw description of the image.

A young man with dark, curly hair is looking directly at the camera. He is wearing a dark green, long-sleeved quarter-zip sweater. The background consists of vertical, pleated curtains in a muted gold or beige color. The lighting is soft and appears to be coming from the front, casting subtle shadows. The overall mood is casual and relaxed, with a slight hint of a vintage aesthetic, possibly due to the film-like quality of the image. The color palette is dominated by dark greens, golds, and skin tones, with a slightly desaturated feel.
